performanceText: BLACK+DECKER 12-Cup Digital Coffee Maker Washable Basket currently shows 4.5 stars from 48,201 Amazon reviews, which gives it enough proof to belong on a serious shortlist. The real question is whether it fits daily home coffee brewing with an easier countertop routine better than the alternatives that sit near it on price and format.
